code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      mut i = 1
      while i <= n
        let m3 = i % 3 == 0
        let m5 = i % 5 == 0
        if m3 and m5
          println("FizzBuzz")
        else if m3
          println("Fizz")
        else if m5
          println("Buzz")
        else
          println("#{i}")
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
